title: Fermat's Little Theorem
description: Fermat's little theorem is used to reason about inverses in prime fields used by Bitcoin cryptography. It helps explain why modular inversion works for non-zero elements.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Keys and Addresses
resources.notes: Provides the field arithmetic background used in ECC derivations.

resources.title: secp256k1 README
resources.notes: Practical notes for inversion and field operations in real code paths.
